reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 사지마세요!!!! 하루 세시간씩 공던져야 됩니다!!!!!집착광공됩니다!!!!!!무슨 태어나서 장난감 처음 본 강아지마냥 하루종일 끼고 삽니다ㅋㅋㅋ1+1이라 하나만 던져줬는데 나머지 하나는 봉인해야될 정도로 공또라이 됐습니다...참고로 집에 장난감 겁나 많습니더...최애등극
reviews.content_en: Don't buy this!!!! You'll have to throw the ball for three hours a day!!!!!It's obsession central!!!!!!Like a puppy seeing a toy for the first time in its life, mine carries it around all day lolol Since it was a 1+1 deal I only gave one, but the other one has to be locked away because he's become a complete ball maniac...By the way, we have tons of toys at home...This is now his ultimate favorite 😍

reviews.name: 조****
reviews.content:
한 입에 쏙 들어가고
말랑말랑하고 소리도 우렁차서
매일 밤낮으로 삑삑 연주해요
reviews.content_en:
Fits perfectly in one bite 🐕
Super soft and squeaks really loud
So he's been squeaking away day and night every single day

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
삑삑이 처돌이 칭구들 필수 장난감~~~
물고 다니느라 잠도 안잔다네요..
쫀득 말랑하고 색감도 예쁜 프렌즈 라텍스 장난감
이름 값 합니당❤️❤️❤️
reviews.content_en:
The squeaky toy is an essential toy for all the little troublemakers~~~
He carries it around so much he won't even sleep...
The BITE ME latex toy is soft and stretchy with such pretty colors
It lives up to its name ❤️❤️❤️

reviews.name: 강****
reviews.content: 안녕하세요 저는 고양이 집사인데요, 구매해서 강아지 친구들에게 선물했어요~~~ 역시 명불허전 장난감 공이네요 엄청 좋아해서 맘이 너무 뿌듯해요 헤헤
reviews.content_en: Hi, I'm a cat parent, but I bought this and gave it as a gift to my dog friends~~~ True to its reputation, it's an amazing toy ball! They love it so much I'm really proud hehe

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
사용후기:
소리가 너무 잘나서 환장합니다 엄청 좋아해서 
뿌듯해요
이 맛에 돈벌지
크기:
다룬 만득이는 모자 스몰도 작은 소두 애기테 좀 큰감이 있었는데 이건 크기도 적당 입에 물기 안부담스러워요 2-3키로 아이들도 이게 최선인 크기 같아요.  저희 아이는 4키로인데 얼굴이 몸과 다리길이에 비해 작아요 🥲
바잇미라 라텍스 소재도 안심 되서 만족
촉감:
그리고 느낌상 다른 만득이 공보다 먼지도 덜 붙는 듯 살짝 미끄덩해서 더 만족 

가격: 1+1로 4000에 득템했어요 행사 잘 이용하세요

배송 :지방 밤에주문하고 다담날 아침 도착
reviews.content_en:
After using it:
The sound is so good it's driving me crazy, they absolutely love it so I'm really happy
That's why I work!
Size:
My previous pup Mandeuk had the small size which was a bit big for his small head, but this one is the perfect size - not awkward to hold in his mouth. For 2-3kg pups this seems like the ideal size. My pup is 4kg with a smaller face compared to his body and leg length 🥲
I'm satisfied because it's BITE ME brand latex material so it's safe
Texture:
It seems to collect less dust compared to other Mandeuk balls, and it's slightly slick which makes me even happier

Price: Got this as a steal with the 1+1 deal for 4,000 won - make good use of the promotions!

Shipping: Ordered at night from the provinces and arrived the next morning

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 우리집강나지 최애 장난감이 되엇어여
reviews.content_en: It's become my pup's favorite toy ever 🥰

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
라텍스 공을 넘 좋아해서 구매했어요 
디자인도 귀엽고 소형견 아이 물기 딱 좋아요
reviews.content_en:
I bought this because my pup loves latex balls so much
The design is cute and it's the perfect size for small dogs to carry around

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content:
진짜 ㄹㅇ 환장해요
두개 샀는데 두개 다 달라고 난리치고 
신나서 몇시간동안 혼자놀앗어요.
삑삑이 공 좋아하는 친구들 강추!!!
reviews.content_en:
I'm literally going crazy over this 😍
Bought two and he's demanding both, throwing a fit
He's been playing happily by himself for hours.
Strongly recommend for friends who love squeaky toys!!!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 6개 시켰는데 색깔 전부 다르게 와서 좋아요! 삑삑이소리가 엄청나요ㅋㅋㅋㅋ 너무너무 좋아하네요
reviews.content_en: Ordered 6 and they all came in different colors which is awesome! The squeaky sound is insane lolol He loves it so so much

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 전엔 파랑이 받았는데 랜덤이라 어쩔수 없는거 알지만 파랑이 말고 다른 색 원했는데 마침 둘다 다른 색으루 받아서 좋았어요 >.<
reviews.content_en: Last time I got blue, and I know it's random so there's nothing I can do about it, but I wanted a different color than blue and this time I got two different colors so I was happy >.<

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content: 삑삑이 소리가 엄청 커요! 그래서 울 동생이 아주 좋아하네요^^ 소형견 입에 물기에 딱 좋은 사이즈라서 이렇게 자주 물고 있어요 ㅋㅋ
reviews.content_en: The squeaky sound is super loud! So my little one absolutely loves it ^^ It's the perfect size for a small dog's mouth, so they're constantly chewing on it lol

reviews.name: 성****
reviews.content:
6개 구매했더니 똑같은거 없이 색깔별로 하나씩 왔어요 :)
너무 귀엽고 아이들이 옴총 좋아해요
사진 찍으려니 빨리 내놓으라고 난리난리〰️😆
조금 아쉬운 부분은 박스에 다른포장 없이 장난감만 덜렁와서 조금 놀랬고 하루도 안되서 벌써 3개나 소리가 안나요
저희 애들이 커서 그런지 제품 자체가 약해서 그런지
소리나는 부분에 꼭따리(?) 그게 너무 잘 빠지는거 같아요
그래도 너무 좋아하고 잘 놀아서 다 망가지면 또 사줄꺼예요🩷
reviews.content_en: I bought 6 and got one of each color without any duplicates :) They're so cute and the kids love them so much! They keep asking me to hand them over when I try to take photos 〰️😆 The only downside is the toys came loose in the box without any separate packaging, which was a bit surprising, and just after less than a day, 3 of them already don't make sounds. Not sure if it's because my kids are rough with toys or if the product itself is fragile, but the clicker (?) part that makes the sound falls out way too easily. Still, they love it so much and play with it so well that I'll buy more when they break 🩷

reviews.name: 배****
reviews.content:
지금 저희애 최애공 입니다ㅋㅋ
이미 동생이 선물해준 거 두개 죽이고 이번에는 제가 사줬는데 역시 제일 좋아해요ㅋㅋ
공이 말랑하고 부드러워  그런지 다른공보다 더 좋아해요
사이즈도 입에 물고 다니기 딱 좋은지 놓질않네요ㅎ
눈떠서 잠들때까지... 던져주라고 해서 힘들지만
곧 또 삑삑이가 죽을것같아서 미리 여러개 더 사놓으려합니당~~
reviews.content_en: This is my pup's absolute favorite ball lol My sibling already killed the two they gave as gifts, and now I bought another one, and my dog loves it the most again lol The ball is soft and squishy so they like it more than other balls. The size is perfect for carrying around in their mouth, so they never put it down lol From the moment they wake up until they fall asleep... they keep asking me to throw it, which is tiring but I'm pretty sure the squeaky will break soon, so I'm thinking of buying several more in advance ~~

reviews.name: 테****
reviews.content: 강아지 최애 장난감으로 등극했어요 이거 하나 던져주면 혼자서도 삑삑거리고 던지고 오랫동안 잘 놀아요 넘 신나해서 넘 귀여움 ㅠㅠ 튼튼하고 삑삑 소리도 잘 나요!!
reviews.content_en: It became my dog's favorite toy! If I throw just this one, they squeak and play with it alone for a long time and have so much fun. They get so excited and it's so cute ㅠㅠ It's durable and the squeaky sound works great!!

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content:
최 애 장 난 감 입니다.

저희 집 모든 장난감이 거의 바잇미 건데

비빔면 계란이 부동의1위이다가 요게 뺏었어요.

하루죙일 삑삑거리고 돌아다녀서 티비도 못 볼지경 ㅠㅠㅠ

입에 물기가 딱 좋고 느낌이 좋은가봐요.

소형견 포메 두마리에게는 최 적의 장난감입니다🧡
reviews.content_en:
This is the ultimate favorite toy.

Most of the toys in our house are BITE ME products,

but Bibimbap Noodles Egg was the undefeated #1 until this one stole the crown.

It squeaks all day long and runs around so much that we can't even watch TV ㅠㅠㅠ

It fits perfectly in their mouth and feels great apparently.

For our two small Pomeranian pups, this is the perfect toy 🧡

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
이거 대박이에요 3개사서 2개를 동네 친구 강쥐들에게 나눔했는데 인기가 짱이네요  울 애기도 이 공을 가장 좋아해요 
아이들 눈빛이 달라지는 공이에요 중국산이라 좀 찜찜했는데 소리가 여느 공보다 월등이 크고 경쾌해요 ㅎㅎ 너무 잘 갖고 놀아서 다음에 또 살꺼에요
reviews.content_en: This is amazing! I bought 3 and gave 2 to neighborhood puppy friends, and it's super popular 😄 My baby loves this ball the most too. This ball changes the sparkle in their eyes! I was a bit hesitant since it's made in China, but the sound is way louder and more cheerful than any other ball hehe They play with it so well that I'll definitely buy it again next time

reviews.name: 곽****
reviews.content: 항상 좋아하는 최애장난감 이에요.같은제품이여도 소리크기가 다 틀려서 큰소리가 나는 오렌지색을 제일 좋아해요
reviews.content_en: It's always my pup's favorite toy. Even with the same product, the squeaky sound volume is different for each one, so my dog loves the orange one that makes a louder sound the most

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content:
삑삑이가 엄청 튼튼해서 하루째 놀고있는데도 소리가 잘나고, 강아지가 너무 좋아해요!
조금 삑삑소리가 큰 느낌도 있지만 튼튼해서 만족입니다ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: The squeaky is super durable and keeps making sound even after playing with it all day, and my dog loves it! The squeaky sound is a bit loud, but I'm satisfied because it's so durable hehe

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content: 삑삑 소리가 엄청 다양하고 경쾌하게 나서 강아지가 좋아해요ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ소형견이 물기에 딱 좋은 크기이고 강아지가 너무 흥분해서 3분만에 삑삑이 망가트린건 안타깝지만 그래도 삑삑 소리랑 상관없이 잘 갖고놀아서 만족합니다 :) 당장 6개세트로 더 사야할 것 같아요ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ
reviews.content_en: The squeaky makes such a variety of cheerful sounds that my dog loves it lol It's the perfect size for a small dog to chew, and while it's unfortunate that the dog got so excited they broke the squeaker in just 3 minutes, they still play with it well regardless of the sound, so I'm satisfied :) I think I need to buy the 6-pack set right away lol

reviews.name: 윤****
reviews.content:
몇개째인지 모를 공 입니다.
말랑말랑한 느낌이 좋은건지 삑삑이만 가져놀면 삑삑삑아주 시끄럽지만 너무좋아해서 계속 사주다가 이번에 12개 세트를 샀어요.

너무 삑삑되서인지 소리가 안나져서 시무륵해하네요.ㅜㅜ

넥카라하고도 공치니는 어쩔수없네요^^
reviews.content_en:
I've lost count of how many balls this is now. The soft, squishy feeling is great—whenever my pup just carries around the squeaky, it's super loud and annoying, but they love it so much that I kept buying more. This time I bought a 12-pack set.

It squeaks so much that some of them aren't making sound, which is disappointing 😢

There's nothing I can do about the neck collar and ball playing together ^^

reviews.name: 신****
reviews.content:
너무 좋아해서 또 구입했는데 저번에 샀던컬러 안겹치게 보내주신거예요?? 저번에 구입 했던 색깔이랑 겹치지 않아서 너무 좋아요

벌써 몇개는 삑삑이가 사망했지만 ㅋㅋㅋㅋ 그래도 좋다고 행복해하는 얼굴보니까 이럴라고 돈벌지 싶네용💖💖
reviews.content_en:
I loved it so much that I bought it again, and you made sure to send me a different color from last time?? I'm so happy that it doesn't match the color I bought before 💖💖

A few of the squeakers have already died lol, but seeing my pup's happy face when playing with them makes me feel like all my hard work is worth it 💖💖

reviews.name: 윤****
reviews.content:
두 가지 색 다르게 노랑, 초록색이 도착했어요!
다른 리뷰와 같이 삑삑이 소리가 진~짜 커서 처음에 좀 놀라더라고요ㅋㅋㅋ 그래서 가위로 삑삑이는 제거해서 주었더니 잘 놀아요!:)
reviews.content_en:
I received two different colors - yellow and green!
Like other reviews mentioned, the squeaker sound is REALLY loud so I was a bit startled at first lol. So I removed the squeaker with scissors and now my pup plays with it great! :)

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 받자마자 너무너무 신났어요!! 작은 공 하나에 세상 신나버린 강아지를 어떻게 사랑하지 않을 수 있나요!🥹🤍
reviews.content_en: I was SO excited the moment I got it!! How can you not love a pup who gets this excited over one little ball?! 🥹🤍

reviews.name: 지****
reviews.content:
다른공보다 좋아해서 추가구매한 공입니다~^^
저렴한 가격이라 몇개는 놔뒀다가 친구들도 ㅈㄷㆍ려구요.
물고오기도 편하고 소리도 잘나서 강쥐가 참 좋아해요..
감사합니다
reviews.content_en:
I bought this as an additional purchase because my pup likes it more than other balls~^^
Since it's affordable, I'm saving a few to give to my friends too.
It's easy for my pup to carry in its mouth and makes a great sound, so my doggy really loves it..
Thank you!

reviews.name: 송****
reviews.content:
애착볼이 된것 같은 좋은 장난감이에요. 
가볍고, 잘 튕겨지며 강아지가 직접 물고 던지며 노는건 처음이에요. 가성비 최고에요!
reviews.content_en: It's become such a beloved toy. It's lightweight, bounces really well, and this is the first time my pup has played by picking it up and throwing it itself. Best bang for your buck!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 귀여운 핑꾸핑꾸로 왔구요 새장난감을 젤 좋아하는 콩이라 입에 물고 계속 삑삑 소리를 내고 있어요 넘 죠아
reviews.content_en: It came in the cutest pink! Kong really loves new toys the most, so she keeps picking it up and making squeaking sounds non-stop lol It's so good

reviews.name: 주****
reviews.content:
살구색?이 왔어요! 저희 강쥐가 라텍스류를 좋아하는거같길래 구입햇어요. 근데 진짜 좋아하네요 ㅎㅎ 지금도 삑삑되면서 혼자 가지고 놀고있어서 시끄러울정도 ㅋㅋㅋ 
다른 공류 여러개 잇긴한데 이건 혼자서도 가지고 놀정도로 넘 좋아하네요 담부턴 공은 이걸로만 사줘야겟어요
reviews.content_en:
I got an apricot-colored one! I bought it because my pup seemed to like latex toys. And wow, he really loves it lol He's playing with it on his own right now while it squeaks, it's so noisy lol
I have several other balls, but he loves this one so much that he plays with it by himself. From now on, I should just buy this one for him!

reviews.name: 신****
reviews.content:
우옹 너무 귀여운데 너무 잘가지고 놀아 
소리 이렇게 잘 나는 삒삑이 오랜만이예요!! 
강아지가 코로 살짝만 눌러도 삑!! 하니까 좋아서 난리났어요 
삑삑이 부분만 골라서 소리 날때까지 찾아 씹던 인형들이랑 달라요 ㅋㅋㅋㅋ 이건 툭치면 바로 반응하니까 엄청 오래 가지고 놀고 있어요 ㅋㅋㅋ 아직도 옆에서 삑삑 거리는중 ㅋㅋㅋ 두개사기를 잘했당
reviews.content_en:
It's so adorable and he plays with it so well
It's been a while since I've seen a squeaker that sounds this good!!
My pup goes crazy because even a slight nudge with his nose makes it squeak! Unlike other toys where he picks out just the squeaker part and chews until it stops making sound, this one responds immediately when touched so he plays with it for super long lol Still squeaking next to me right now lol I'm so glad I bought two!

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content: 강아지가 엄청 좋아해서 벌써 몇개째인지 모르겠어요! 삑삑소리도 엄청 현란하고 선명해서 강아지가 더 좋아해요!  1+1 행사로 저렴하게 산 것 같아 더 만족스러워요 :))
reviews.content_en: My pup loves it SO much that I've lost count of how many I've bought! The squeaker sound is super vibrant and clear so my pup loves it even more! I feel even more satisfied because I got it cheap with the 1+1 deal :))

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 너무 좋아요. 공 모양보다 호떡 모양이라 굴리긴 하지만 엄청나게 잘 굴리진 않아요 공처럼요! 3개월 강아지에겐 딱 맞는 사이즈고, 아이가 평소에 좋아하는 삑삑이 공이 찢어져서 새로 구매했습니다! 너무 좋아서 어쩔 줄 몰라요! 1+1 이라 더 좋아요.
reviews.content_en: I love it so much. It's more of a hotteok shape than a ball shape so it rolls, but not like a regular ball! It's the perfect size for my 3-month-old pup, and since his favorite squeaky ball got torn, I bought a new one! I'm so happy I don't know what to do with myself! And the 1+1 deal makes it even better.

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 다이소에서 산 뽁뽁이 공이 이틀만에 소리가 안나서 바잇미에서 다시 구입했어요 사운드가 달라요 쨍쨍합니다 밤에는 숨겨놓아야지 다른집에서 들릴꺼 같아요
reviews.content_en: I bought a bubble ball at Daiso, but it stopped making sound after just two days, so I repurchased it from BITE ME. The sound is different. It's really loud and crisp! 😄 I have to hide it at night because the neighbors might hear it.

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
진짜 설명대로 소리 우렁찹니다. 이거 때문에 강아지 흥분해서 물고다니기 시작하면 사람 귀에선 피나요!ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ 근데 저희
강아지가 너무 좋아하고 신나게 가지고 놀아서 아주 좋습니다. 세척도 물로 닦아주면 되니 편할 것 같아요. 굴려주면 엄청 잘 굴러가서 밤에는 층간소음 없이도 잘 놀 수 있겠어요
reviews.content_en: The sound really is as loud as described. When my dog gets excited from this and starts carrying it around, it literally makes my ears ring! 😂 But my dog absolutely loves it and plays with it so enthusiastically that it's amazing. Cleaning is easy too—just rinse with water. It rolls really well when you roll it, so my dog can play at night without any noise complaints upstairs!

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content:
삑삑 악개 강아지에게 추천합니다
저는 라텍스 삑삑이 소모품으로 생각해서 자주 사주는데 바잇미에서 새로 나온 소식듣고 구매했어요
받자마자 택 떼낼거라고 잡았는데 살짝만 잡아도 삑삑 소리 장난아니에요! 강아지가 너무 좋아해요
🫧장난감 손으로 잡고 택 끈 살살 힘주어 잡아당기면 깔끔하게 빠져요
reviews.content_en: Highly recommend for dogs that love squeaky toys! 🐕 I think of latex squeakies as consumables and buy them often, but when I heard about BITE ME's new release, I had to get it. As soon as I got it, my dog grabbed it before I even took the tag off—and wow, the squeak is seriously loud! My dog absolutely loves it 🫧 The toy is easy to hold and the tag comes off cleanly when you gently pull the string.

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 제가 젤 원했던 하늘색이 와서 너무 기뻐요!!!!! 라텍스 장난감 많은데 이번거 강아지도 유독 더 좋아하네요! 몇개더살까봐요
reviews.content_en: I'm so happy I got the light blue color I wanted!!!!! 💙 There are lots of latex toys, but my dog seems to love this one especially! I'm thinking about buying a few more.

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
뭔가 가운대 선이 조만간 갈라질거 같아요.. ㅎㅎ ;;  퀄리티가
그렇게 좋은 편은 아닌거 같지만 삑삑이 이즈 뭔들 최곱니다 ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: I have a feeling the seam in the middle might split soon... 😅 The quality isn't the best, but hey, for a squeaky toy it's pretty great! 😄

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 저희 갱쥐 최애 삑삑이! 다른 삑삑이랑 다르게 소리도 경쾌하고(?) 통통 튀어서 바잇미 삑삑이 사준 이후로 다른 삑삑이는 쳐다도 안보네요😂 1+1 이벤트하길래 부랴부랴 주문했어용
reviews.content_en: My hamster's favorite squeaky! 🐹 Unlike other squeakies, the sound is really upbeat(?) and it bounces around—ever since I got this BITE ME squeaky, my hamster won't even look at other squeakies anymore 😂 They were doing a 1+1 event so I rushed to order!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 귀여워요 근데 라텍스삑삑이치곤 개당 가격이 좀 비싼너낌 ㅋㅋ 애가 엄청조아해용
reviews.content_en: It's cute, but for a latex squeaky the price feels a bit steep 😂 But my pup absolutely loves it!

reviews.name: 신****
reviews.content: 받자마자 최애 됐어요!! 계속 물고다니고 던져달라하고 잘가지고 놀아요~ 잘때도 물고와서 놀다가 잠들고 일어나자마자 가지고 놀아요
reviews.content_en: It became my dog's instant favorite!! She constantly carries it around, asks me to throw it, and plays with it so well. She even brings it to bed and falls asleep playing with it, and the first thing she does when she wakes up is grab it to play! 🐕

reviews.name: 오****
reviews.content:
친구들 주려고 구입햇는데 센스있게 색 다 다르게 보내주셨어요! 기존 갖고있던 삑삑이랑 달라서 좋아요
말랑거리고 한입 물기 좋아서 엄청 좋아해요
reviews.content_en: I bought these as gifts for friends and they thoughtfully sent them all in different colors! They're different from the squeakies I already have, which is great. They're soft and easy to bite, so my dog loves them so much!

reviews.name: 전****
reviews.content: 강아지가 삑삑이 장난감을 너무 좋아해서 구매했어요. 삑삑 소리가 엄청 우렁차요. 라텍스 장난감은 조금만 가지고 놀면 구멍나고 소리 안나던데 이건 좀 오래갔으면 좋겠어요. 이 장난감 준 후로는 이것만 가지고 놀아요.
reviews.content_en: My dog loves squeaky toys so much that I bought this. The squeak is incredibly loud. With latex toys, usually after a little play they get holes and stop making sound, but I hope this one lasts longer. Ever since I gave her this toy, she only plays with this one!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 원래 라텍스 삑삑이를 좋아하는데 바잇미 삑삑이가 저렴하고 색감도 좋아샀어요. 냄새도 많이 안나고 삑삑이 소리도 잘나내요.
reviews.content_en: I originally liked latex squeaky toys, and I bought the BITE ME squeaky toy because it was affordable and the colors looked nice. It doesn't have much of a smell and the squeaky sound comes out really well.

reviews.name: 손****
reviews.content: 가장 좋아하는 장난감이에요! 혼자서도 신나게 굴리고 튕기고 삑삑 물고다니면서 오래 자주 놀아요! 삑삑이가 금새 사망해서 다시 사주려는 찰나 1+1 이벤트 하길래 얼른 주문했습니다 :) 새거 건네주자 마자 죙일 삑삑거리면서 입에 물고다녀요😆 삑삑이 사망해도 잘 가지고 노는데 소리나면 더 재미있어 해요!! 던져주면서 같이 놀기도 좋아요🥰
reviews.content_en: It's his favorite toy! He plays with it all day long, rolling it, bouncing it, and carrying it around squeaking on his own. The squeaker broke pretty quickly, so I was about to buy a new one when they had a 1+1 event, so I ordered right away :) As soon as I gave him the new one, he's been squeaking and carrying it around all day 😆 Even though the squeaker died, he still plays with it well, but he enjoys it even more when it makes noise!! It's also great to play together by throwing it 🥰

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
장난감중에 공을 제일 좋아하는데.공도 지가 맘에 드는것만 갖고노는데,다행히 이건 잘갖고 놀아요~
한번 시작하면 1시간은 기본이라 힘들들지만.개아들이 좋아하면 그만이죠~^^;;
reviews.content_en: Out of all the toys, he loves balls the most. He only plays with the ones he likes, but thankfully he plays well with this one~ Once he starts, he'll go for at least an hour straight, so it's tiring for us, but as long as my pup is happy, that's what matters~^^;;

reviews.name: 권****
reviews.content:
삑삑이 공 좋아하는 말티푸아가 무지 좋아해요
다른곳에서 산거보다 단단하고 냄새도 덜 나요
랜덤이지만 색상도 맘에 듭니다.
reviews.content_en: My Maltipoo loves squeaky balls, and he loves this one so much! It's firmer than the ones I bought elsewhere and has less of a smell. While the colors are random, I'm happy with them.

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 되게 말랑말랑하고 얇아요!! 강아지가 너무 좋아해요! 삑삑이는 금방 고장났지만 ㅠㅠ 찢어지지 않고 튼튼 너무 좋아요ㅠ!
reviews.content_en: It's really soft and thin!! My dog loves it so much! The squeaker broke pretty quickly though ㅠㅠ But it doesn't tear and it's so durable that it's great ㅠ!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 장난감을 두개 사더라두 항상 하나가지구 싸우길래 하나만 구매했더니 이거가지구 하루종일 싸워요 ㅜ.ㅜ 아무래두 하나 더 구매해야할거 같습니당 ㅎㅎㅎ 소리가 쉽게 잘나서 댕댕이들이 잘가지구 놀아요 !
reviews.content_en: Even when I bought two toys, they'd always fight over one, so I bought just one, but now they fight over this one all day long ㅜ.ㅜ I think I need to buy one more haha The sound comes out easily, so the pups play with it really well!

reviews.name: 윤****
reviews.content: 일단 무독성이라고 해서 좋았고 삑삑소리도 잘나고 크기도 딱 강얼쥐가 갖고놀기 좋아서 만족합니다
reviews.content_en: First of all, I liked that it's non-toxic, the squeaky sound comes out well, and the size is perfect for my dog to carry around and play with, so I'm satisfied.

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 저희집애기가 너무좋아해서하나더사줬는데 이리좋아하니 넘 뿌듯하네여
reviews.content_en: My baby loved it so much that I bought him another one, and seeing how much he loves them makes me so happy 🥰

reviews.name: 안****
reviews.content:
우래기들이 가장 좋아하는  장난감이예요
잘때도 꼭안고자요ㅋㅋ
reviews.content_en: It's the favorite toy for our pups! Even when they're sleeping, they want to hug it lol

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 진짜좋아해요 얼마안가지만...
reviews.content_en: He really loves it, though it doesn't last long...
